name: Mzizi Ceramic Pour-Over Set
description: A hand-thrown stoneware dripper paired with a 600ml carafe. Matte clay glaze, walnut collar, and a slow-flow filter cone designed for single-origin Kenyan beans.

name: Savanna Wool Throw Blanket
description: Woven from undyed highland wool in a herringbone pattern. Generously sized at 150x200cm, finished with a hand-knotted fringe.

name: Nairobi Skyline Print, A2
description: Archival giclee print of the Nairobi skyline at dusk, screen-printed in two tones on 250gsm cotton paper. Frame not included.

name: Field Notebook, Set of 3
description: Pocket-sized notebooks with dot-grid pages, sewn bindings, and recycled kraft covers. Sold as a set of three colourways.

name: Brass Desk Lamp
description: Solid brass task lamp with an articulating arm and a warm 2700K LED bulb. Weighted base in matte black powder coat.

name: Recycled Canvas Tote
description: Heavyweight canvas tote made from reclaimed sailcloth, with leather-wrapped handles and an interior zip pocket.

name: Soapstone Chess Set
description: Hand-carved soapstone chess pieces in charcoal and cream, paired with a folding hardwood board with felt-lined storage.

name: Cold Brew Concentrate, 4-Pack
description: Slow-steeped 18-hour cold brew concentrate, single-origin AA beans. Dilute 1:3 with water or milk. Pack of four 250ml bottles.

name: Linen Apron, Charcoal
description: Heavyweight washed linen apron with adjustable neck strap, cross-back ties, and a deep front pocket. One size fits most.

name: Terrazzo Coasters, Set of 4
description: Cast terrazzo coasters with a cork backing, each one unique. Set of four in warm neutral tones.

name: Walnut Cutting Board
description: End-grain walnut board with a juice groove and integrated handle, finished with food-safe mineral oil.

name: Merino Beanie, Clay
description: Ribbed merino wool beanie, unlined for breathability. One size, naturally regulates temperature.
